---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
    title-block-banner: false
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>

/* ===== NAVBAR ===== */

.navbar{
  background-color:#0b3d2e !important;
  border-bottom:1px solid #14532d;
}

.navbar-brand,
.navbar a{
  color:white !important;
  font-weight:600;
}

.navbar a:hover{
  color:#bbf7d0 !important;
}

/* ===== GENERAL ===== */

body{
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, #eefbf3, #dff5e7);
  font-family:'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
  color:#1f2937;
}

main.content{
  padding-top:12px !important;
}

/* ===== HERO ===== */

.hero{
  background: linear-gradient(135deg,#14532d,#22c55e);
  color:white;
  padding:55px 40px;
  border-radius:22px;
  text-align:center;
  margin-bottom:24px;
  box-shadow:0px 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.hero h1{
  font-size:3rem;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}

.hero p{
  max-width:720px;
  margin:auto;
  font-size:1.05rem;
  line-height:1.7;
  opacity:0.96;
}

/* ===== CARDS ===== */

.card-box{
  background:white;
  border-radius:18px;
  padding:26px;
  box-shadow:0px 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}

.card-box h2{
  color:#166534;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}

/* ===== CODE ===== */

.cell{
  background:#f8fffa;
  border-radius:16px;
  padding:14px;
  border:1px solid #dcfce7;
}

/* ===== FOOTER ===== */

.footer{
  text-align:center;
  margin-top:28px;
  padding:12px;
  color:#166534;
  font-size:0.95rem;
}

</style>

::: {.hero}

Assignment 2

Simple R Computation

This assignment demonstrates a basic R operation as part of the EMU430 Data Analytics course.

:::

::: {.card-box}

Objective

The purpose of this assignment is to practice basic R syntax and ensure proper Quarto rendering.

:::

::: {.card-box}

R Code
1 + 1

:::

::: {.card-box}

Result Interpretation

The expression 1 + 1 evaluates to 2, demonstrating a basic arithmetic operation in R. I am waiting for the 2nd assignment :) .

:::

<div class="footer">

Made with 💚 using R and Quarto

</div> ```
